key_takeaway: Seaside Villas can replace 4 tools with one platform and save 15+ hours per week on pricing alone — while preparing to scale from 85 to 120 properties by Q4.
summary_bullets: Your team is managing 85 properties across the Algarve with 4 disconnected tools — Boom consolidates everything into one dashboard
Manual pricing is eating 15+ hours/week — Boom's dynamic pricing engine automates this with market data
You're planning to scale to 120 properties by Q4 — Boom's automation means you can grow without growing headcount
executive_summary: We had a fantastic conversation about how Seaside Villas can consolidate their current 4-tool stack into Boom's unified platform. Maria and Tom shared the challenges of managing 85 properties across Portugal's Algarve coast, from fragmented guest communication to manual pricing adjustments. We walked through how Boom handles multi-channel distribution, automated guest messaging, and dynamic pricing — all from one dashboard. Both expressed strong interest in moving forward with a full demo next week.

discussion_points.title: Current Challenges
items: Managing 4 separate tools (Guesty, PriceLabs, Hospitable, spreadsheets)
No unified view of guest communications across channels
Difficulty onboarding new team members due to tool complexity
Limited reporting — can't see portfolio performance at a glance

discussion_points.title: How Boom Addresses This
items: Single platform replacing all 4 tools — one login, one dashboard
Unified inbox for all guest messages (Airbnb, Booking.com, direct)
Built-in dynamic pricing with market data integration
Intuitive UI designed for team onboarding in days, not weeks
Real-time portfolio analytics and owner reporting

discussion_points.title: Growth Opportunities
items: Expanding to 120 properties by Q4 — needs scalable ops
Direct booking channel launch planned for summer
Owner acquisition strategy could benefit from Boom's reporting
Potential to reduce team from 6 to 4 with automation

demo_highlights.benefit: Every guest message from Airbnb, Booking.com, and direct — in one timeline. No more switching between tabs.
Your rates adjust automatically based on market demand, events, and competitor data. No more 15-hour/week manual work.
Your property owners get real-time revenue and occupancy dashboards — fewer calls, happier owners.
Cleaning and maintenance tasks auto-assign based on check-in/check-out. Your team just follows the list.

next_steps.action: Send detailed proposal with pricing for 85 properties
Full product demo with operations team (3 additional members)
Review current Guesty contract renewal date
Prepare migration timeline and data export checklist
Decision on moving forward with pilot
